result.final_answer: <answer>Perplexity AI, Inc., is an American privately held software company offering a web search engine that processes user queries and synthesizes responses[web:2]. Perplexity products utilize large language models and incorporate real-time web search capabilities, providing responses based on current Internet content, citing sources used[web:2]. A free public version is available, while a paid Pro subscription offers access to more advanced language models and additional features[web:2]. Here are three section headings from the article: * History[web:2] * Products and services[web:2] * Search engine web portal[web:2]</answer>
